Despite the label, the amount equals the sum of current debt, payables, taxes, and other short-term liabilities, so it functions as total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose 'Total short term debt' outside the shortlist for LCT because the values reconcile to aggregate current liabilities, not just interest-bearing short-term debt.

candidates.why: Interest-bearing short-term borrowing; valid STD component.

candidates.why: Current portion of other long-term loans; valid STD component and excludes leases.
